_comment: OpenReaper MCP server configuration for Cursor. Cursor uses the same MCP servers config shape as Claude Code; this file mirrors examples/claude-code.example.json with a Cursor-flavored filename for discoverability. The internal MCP server key remains streetlight for v0.1 compatibility.
_notes: If you registered OpenReaper / Streetlight in Claude Code already, you can reuse the same config.
See examples/claude-code.example.json for the Windows path equivalent.
